title: PyPixoo: kanbus_clock uses single kbs root
description:
As a PyPixoo operator
I want kanbus_clock to run all kbs commands from a single root
So that Kanbus handles nested project discovery and IDs are correct.

Feature: Single-root kbs execution

Scenario: kbs show is executed from --root
  Given kanbus_clock is started with --root /path
  When it fetches issue details
  Then kbs show is executed with cwd=/path

Scenario: Header prefix uses canonical issue key from kbs show
  Given kbs show returns id "PIXO-123abc"
  When a card is rendered
  Then the header prefix is "PIXO"

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Starting PyPixoo changes: will remove per-event cwd logic in kanbus_clock and run all kbs commands from a single root (default to --root).

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Updated kanbus_clock to use a single kbs root, removed per-event repo config lookup, and added ambiguous-id skip handling; tests updated for new behavior.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: PyPixoo tests updated and green: uv run pytest tests/test_kanbus_clock.py -q (33 passed).
